title: UN Sustainable Development Goal Alignment
note: SDG alignment is easy to overclaim — every startup maps itself to half the goals. This file distinguishes goals the product GENUINELY and DIRECTLY serves from ones it touches tangentially, and it flags where the product's second-order effects could run AGAINST a goal. An honest SDG map includes the tensions.

primary_alignment.title: Zero Hunger
primary_alignment.target: 2.4 — sustainable food production systems and resilient agricultural practices
primary_alignment.mechanism: Aquatic food is a major and growing protein source; reducing losses and improving yield in aquaculture directly increases food availability. Aquaculture is now the majority of aquatic animal production.
primary_alignment.honest_caveat: The contribution is real but bounded by our addressable fraction of the sector and by whether farms act on the information. Do not claim to 'solve hunger'.

primary_alignment.title: Life Below Water
primary_alignment.target: 14.2 — sustainably manage and protect marine and coastal ecosystems; 14.1 — reduce marine pollution
primary_alignment.mechanism: Measuring aquaculture's effluent load and supporting carrying-capacity management reduces the eutrophication of shared water bodies. Pollution detection supports 14.1.
primary_alignment.honest_caveat: The strongest environmental claim, BUT it depends on the carrying-capacity use case actually being adopted, which requires cross-farm data-sharing that is unresolved (see ethics-data-privacy.json). And note the over-stocking paradox below — the product could also enable intensification.

primary_alignment.title: Responsible Consumption and Production
primary_alignment.target: 12.2 — sustainable management and efficient use of natural resources
primary_alignment.mechanism: Reducing feed waste (feed is ~60 percent of operating cost and a major environmental load) improves resource efficiency. Precision dosing reduces chemical and antimicrobial use.
primary_alignment.honest_caveat: The antimicrobial claim cuts both ways — easier dosing can mean more dosing. See the tension below.

secondary_alignment.title: No Poverty
secondary_alignment.mechanism: For smallholders, a single kill event can be financially catastrophic. Preventing or mitigating it protects livelihoods. Continuous records could unlock credit and insurance for the currently uninsurable.
secondary_alignment.honest_caveat: Directly limited by the affordability paradox — the smallholders most exposed to poverty are the ones who cannot pay for the product. The poverty contribution depends entirely on the cooperative and institutional channels succeeding.

secondary_alignment.title: Decent Work and Economic Growth
secondary_alignment.mechanism: Removes the dangerous pre-dawn boat run (a real drowning risk), and stabilises aquaculture incomes. SDG 8.8 — safe working environments.
secondary_alignment.honest_note: The occupational-safety angle is genuine and underused. It is a human argument, not just an efficiency one.

secondary_alignment.title: Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure
secondary_alignment.mechanism: Brings precision-agriculture-grade instrumentation to a sector and geography that lacks it.

secondary_alignment.title: Climate Action
secondary_alignment.mechanism: Increasing frequency of thermal and rainfall extremes worsens fish kills; the platform shortens reaction time to climate-driven events. Adaptation, not mitigation.
secondary_alignment.honest_caveat: We do not reduce emissions. We help farmers adapt to climate volatility's local expression. Claiming climate MITIGATION would be false.

the_tensions_an_honest_sdg_map_must_incl.note: This section is what separates a real SDG analysis from a marketing exercise. Every one of these is a way the product could work AGAINST a goal it claims to serve.

tensions.detail: Better instruments may let operators push stocking density higher, worsening the eutrophication and carrying-capacity problems the product claims to help. A tool sold on environmental stewardship could enable environmental degradation.
tensions.our_response: Carrying-capacity analytics aimed at collective governance; not marketing as a licence to intensify. Partial mitigation only. See risk R-15.

tensions.detail: Easier dosing can mean more prophylactic antimicrobial use, contributing to antimicrobial resistance — a serious public health problem.
tensions.our_response: Dose ceilings, human authorisation, precision placement to reduce total dose. Weak controls against a determined operator. See ethics-data-privacy.json.

tensions.detail: If the product only reaches well-capitalised commercial farms, it widens the gap between them and smallholders — the opposite of reducing inequality. Precision technology that only the rich can afford entrenches advantage.
tensions.our_response: Cooperative and institutional channels are the mechanism for equitable reach, and they must not be allowed to slip. This is an active commitment, not an automatic outcome.

tensions.detail: Aerial imagery over communities, and the latent surveillance capability, could harm the people the product is meant to serve.
tensions.our_response: No person-detection, no enforcement use, data-minimisation. See ethics-data-privacy.json.

tensions.tension: Environmental footprint of the hardware (against SDG 12)
tensions.detail: Lithium batteries, electronic waste, and the risk of a ditched drone contaminating a food-production water body are real environmental costs of the solution itself.
tensions.our_response: Lithium containment, ditching provision, and honest lifecycle accounting. A product sold on stewardship must account for its own footprint. See environmental-impact.json.

the_tensions_an_honest_sdg_map_must_incl.why_this_matters: An SDG map with only benefits is a sustainability-washing exercise, and sophisticated impact investors and thesis committees recognise it instantly. Including the tensions — with honest, sometimes-partial responses — is what makes the alignment credible.

how_to_use_this.for_impact_investors: Lead with SDG 2, 14, and 12 (the genuine primary alignments), then volunteer the tensions. An impact investor who sees you have thought about the over-stocking paradox trusts the rest of your claims.
how_to_use_this.for_the_thesis: This is the significance-of-the-study section. The tensions belong in the discussion chapter as limitations, not hidden.
how_to_use_this.the_discipline: Never map the product to a goal it does not directly serve just to fill the grid. Three strong alignments plus honest tensions beats seventeen weak ones.
